news.headline: Fed's Daly: I see policy in a position supporting both goals, lowering inflation but not breaking the labor market.
Fed's Daly: We're really working toward that soft landing.
Impending shutdown as President-elect Trump and Elon Musk's influence sparks crisis, putting federal government on the brink.
news.summary: The incoming president, Donald Trump, along with entrepreneur Elon Musk, have begun shaping policies even before Trump officially takes office. Their influence has pushed the federal government to the brink of a shutdown, just hours away before potential closure.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: I was comfortable with median outlook.
Fed's Daly: My projection is it will take many fewer rate cuts next year than we had thought.
Madison Liquidators partners with Corp Design to introduce stylish glass conference tables to their product lineup.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on December 20, 2024, Madison Liquidators revealed their latest addition to their online office furniture collection. They have introduced sleek glass conference tables from Corp Design, further enhancing their product range. This move signifies their commitment to offering top-notch office furniture and keeping up with modern design trends.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: We can return to a more typical pattern of gradualism.
Fed's Daly: Now you wait watchfully before making further cuts.
Fed's Daly: I'm very comfortable with projection of two rate cuts in 2025.
Prominent college football player signs Bitcoin deal with USC, boosting NIL earnings with cryptocurrency for future gains.
news.summary: Tagoa’i expressed his enthusiasm, stating, “This will make a significant difference for me. By allocating a portion of my Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) earnings to Bitcoin, I am establishing a foundation for sustained financial progress in the future.”

news.headline: Fed's Daly: Ultiimately I determined the 100 bps to now was right place, recalibration phase is now over.
Fed's Daly: I saw this as a close call.
Risk of US government shutdown at midnight as House rejects bill.
Fed's Daly: I think we have policy in a good place, prepared for what is before us.
Fed's Daly: Risks to the outlook are equally balanced.
Fed's Daly: The data on inflation are coming in showing slowed progress relative to what we wanted; it's bumpy.
Latch (soon to be DOOR) completes restatement, files 2022 Annual Report on Form 10-K on Dec 19, 2024, with Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for June 30, 2022 & Sept 30, 2022.
news.summary: St. Louis-based Latch, Inc., soon to be known as DOOR, has completed a restatement and filed its 2022 Annual Report on Form 10-K with the SEC. This move was confirmed on December 19, 2024, and the Company also submitted its Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for the quarters ended June 30, 2022, and September 30, 2022. This marks a significant update following previous announcements.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: We don't know what incoming administration will do so for me it''s about the data.
Publisher Britannica embraces A.I., evolving in digital era. Contemplates going public as digital learning giant.
news.summary: The company that produces encyclopedias was at risk of failing due to the popularity of Wikipedia. However, it has successfully transformed into a leading digital education provider and is considering the possibility of conducting an Initial Public Offering (IPO).

news.headline: Zimmer Biomet to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 14, 2025, at 8:15 a.m. PT.
news.summary: In Warsaw, Indiana on December 20, 2024, Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. disclosed that their management team will speak at the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The presentation is scheduled for January 14, 2025, at 8:15 a.m. Pacific Time. Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and the SIX Swiss Exchange under the ticker symbol ZBH.

news.headline: Ballard secures orders for 90 fuel cell engines, totalling 6.4 MW for European bus market.
news.summary: Ballard Power Systems has revealed that they have received orders from two bus manufacturers to provide more than 90 fuel cell engines for the European and UK city bus market. This amounts to about 6.4 megawatts (MW) of total rated power. This development was announced in Vancouver, BC, on December 20, 2024. The company's stocks are listed on NASDAQ as BLDP and on TSX as BLDP.

news.headline: Alabama land-grant institutions assist families with "heirs property" through Extension System; important support provided statewide.
news.summary: In Auburn, Alabama, as of December 20, 2024, land-grant institutions are actively engaging in efforts to assist families grappling with "heirs property" concerns by offering guidance and resources at various Alabama Cooperative Extension System facilities across the state. Ryan Thomson, serving as an assistant within this initiative, plays a key role in delivering support and information to these families.

news.headline: Coupon rate adjustment starts on Jan 1, 2025.
Novo Nordisk stock drops dramatically due to underwhelming performance of new weight drug, record decline.
InflaRx starts Phase 2a study for Oral C5aR Inhibitor INF904 in Germany, focusing on CSU and HS, dosing first patient.
news.summary: In Jena, Germany, on December 20, 2024, InflaRx N.V. (Nasdaq: IFRX) disclosed that the initial patient was administered a dose in its Phase 2a basket study for chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) and hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). The study focuses on the oral C5aR inhibitor, INF904, which is a pioneering anti-inflammatory therapeutic targeted at the complement system. This marks a significant milestone in the research and development efforts, showcasing progress in advancing potential treatments for these conditions.

news.headline: Elevai Labs Inc. to become PMGC Holdings Inc., moving from Delaware to Nevada, and trading under the symbol "ELAB" on Nasdaq.
news.summary: PMGC Holdings Inc. (formerly Elevai Labs Inc.) announced plans for a strategic reorganization on Dec. 20, 2024. The reorganization involves changing the name to PMGC Holdings Inc. and relocating from Delaware to Nevada. The Company will still be trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “ELAB.” The changes will officially take effect on Dec. 23, 2024, at the opening of business.

news.headline: Acuren Corporation reports financial results for Q3 and 9 months ended Sept 30, 2024; Acquisition of ASP Acuren Holdings impacts comparability.
news.summary: Acuren Corporation reported its financial results for the third quarter and nine-month periods ending on September 30, 2024. During this time, the company experienced changes in operating results due to the acquisition of ASP Acuren Holdings, Inc. The financial performance for the period from July 30, 2024, to September 30, 2024, is considered the Successor period, while January 1, 2024, to July 29, 2024, is the Predecessor period. Comparing these periods with the nine months ending on September 30, 2023, reveals the impact of the acquisition on Acuren's business.

news.headline: Carbon Done Right plans $250,000 private placement at $0.015 per Unit for common Share.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on December 20, 2024, Carbon Done Right Developments Inc. (TSXV: KLX) (FSE: Q1C) revealed plans for a non-brokered private placement aiming to generate up to $250,000. The company specializes in top-tier carbon credits sourced from its afforestation and reforestation ventures. The Offering includes units priced at $0.015 each, with each unit containing one common share.

news.headline: Quantum BioPharma buys $1,000,000 Bitcoin & other cryptos, allows future transactions in crypto.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 20, 2024, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. (NASDAQ: QNTM) (CSE: QNTM) (FRA: 0K91) disclosed its latest move, revealing the acquisition of USD $1,000,000 worth of Bitcoin (BTC) and various other cryptocurrencies. The decision was made following approval from the Board of Directors and forms a key component of the Company's strategic plans. Additionally, Quantum BioPharma will now facilitate cryptocurrency usage for forthcoming financial transactions and other activities.

news.headline: Comstock sells Northern Mining Targets to Mackay Precious Metals for $2.75 million, retains 1.5% NSR production royalty.
news.summary: In Virginia City, Nevada, on December 20, 2024, Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) disclosed a significant business move. The company has finalized a deal to sell 100% ownership of the northernmost mining claims, mineral exploration rights, and town lots known as the “Northern Targets” through its subsidiary, Comstock Northern Exploration, LLC. Additionally, they are selling their 25% ownership in Pelen LLC to Mackay Precious Metals Inc. for a total of $2.75 million. As part of the agreement, Comstock will receive a 1.5% NSR production royalty from the sales of silver, gold, and other minerals extracted from these properties indefinitely.

news.headline: SciBase CEO shares successful company growth in 2024, including US expansion, skin barrier segment success, and entry into new markets.
news.summary: In December 2024, SciBase made substantial progress and set the stage for ongoing expansion by establishing a presence in the United States, achieving success in the skin barrier sector, and entering into untapped markets. The company's enhanced US presence marks a notable development as it aims to fuel growth, with achievements in the skin barrier field propelling its diversification efforts.

news.headline: The Emotion AI market, led by IBM, Microsoft, and Google, is expected to grow from $2.74 billion in 2024 to $9.01 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 21.9%. Key drivers include demand for customer experience enhancement and advancements in AI. Privacy concerns and high implementation costs are notable restraints. Integration with IoT, wearable devices, and expansion into new verticals present opportunities.
news.summary: The Emotion AI market is expected to reach USD 9.01 billion by 2030 from USD 2.74 billion in 2024, with a projected CAGR of 21.9% during the forecast period. The market dynamics include drivers like demand for customer experience enhancement, advancements in AI and machine learning technologies, and increased applications in healthcare and education. However, there are challenges such as privacy concerns and high implementation costs, while opportunities lie in expanding into new verticals, integrating with IoT and wearable devices, and meeting the demand in remote work and virtual environments. Key players in the market include IBM, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Smart Eye, Entropik Tech, among others, who are focusing on innovative technologies and partnerships to enhance their offerings and global presence. This growth is attributed to emotion-driven marketing strategies.

news.headline: Hexaware wins 2024 ISG Star of Excellence™ Global Region Award with 86.7 CX score - a top honor in tech industry.
news.summary: In Iselin, New Jersey, on December 20, 2024, Hexaware Technologies, a leading provider of IT services and solutions, achieved significant recognition by securing the prestigious 2024 ISG Star of Excellence™ Universal (Global) Region award along with the CX Star Performer award. These awards highlight the company's excellence in both technology and business domains.

news.headline: Report analyzes 1,087 AI-driven drug discovery patents, providing insights into market sales data and growth rates.
news.summary: A report titled "AI Driven Drug Discovery Patent Landscape Report 2024" has been recently included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report focuses on AI-driven drug discovery and conducts a detailed analysis of 1,087 patents across various primary jurisdictions. The analysis incorporates data from patent filings and market sales insights to present a comprehensive overview. By blending quantitative and qualitative data, the report establishes a robust data foundation covering patent applications, technology trends, and market insights.

news.headline: Defense Metals Corp. grants 9,950,000 incentive stock options to directors, officers, and consultants.
news.summary: Defense Metals Corp., based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed the issuance of 9,950,000 incentive stock options to its directors, officers, and consultants. These options were granted under the ticker symbols TSXV: DEFN, OTCQB: DFMTF, and FSE: 35D. The recipients of these options are subject to regulations set by the TSX Venture Exchange.

news.headline: Analyst from Mizuho recommends selling Euro citing multiple reasons in latest report.
Global vehicle telematics market, 3rd edition: Over 1.5 billion vehicles worldwide with 47.3 million aftermarket devices sold in 2023, market value of €2.2 billion.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Global Vehicle Telematics Hardware Market 3rd Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The aftermarket telematics solutions market is substantial, with an estimated 1.52 billion registered vehicles worldwide by the end of 2022. In 2023, approximately 47.3 million aftermarket telematics hardware devices were sold globally, generating a total market worth of around €2.2 billion. The Asia-Pacific region stands out as the largest geographical market for these products.

news.headline: President-elect Trump places $4B worth of shares of his media company in a trust, transferring 115M shares to son Donald Jr.
news.summary: According to official documents submitted for regulation purposes, the incoming president recently shifted approximately 115 million shares of Trump Media to a trust overseen by his son, Donald Trump Jr.

news.headline: Expert at Mizuho suggests many reasons to continue selling Euro; advice from Rochester.
news.summary: A recent report has revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has hit a new low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.5%. The report also highlights a 2.1% increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a 3.5% rise, providing some relief to workers. The positive trends in the labor market have been attributed to various government initiatives aimed at boosting employment and economic growth. Experts suggest that the current trajectory indicates a stable and flourishing job market.

news.headline: Witan PLC reports Net Asset Value of $xxx per share, up from $xxx last month, reflecting strong performance.
news.summary: The recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking an increase of 1.2% compared to last month. The number of jobless individuals has reached 2.4 million, with the youth being the most affected demographic. The government has announced plans to address this issue by introducing new employment programs and initiatives aimed at creating job opportunities for the citizens. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was reported at 3.8%, signaling a slight decrease from the previous year.Experts predict that the economy is facing challenges that may impact future growth prospects. To tackle this, economic policies are being reviewed to stimulate investment and boost economic recovery. In response to these developments, the stock market experienced a decline, with the main index dropping by 2.5%. Investors are advised to monitor the situation closely and diversify their portfolios to mitigate potential risks. Overall, the current economic landscape presents a mix of challenges and opportunities that require strategic planning and swift action to ensure sustainable growth.

news.headline: SciBase plans capital raise of approximately SEK, awaiting approval from shareholders.
news.summary: In Stockholm on December 20, 2024, SciBase Holding AB disclosed plans for a capital raise of around SEK [specific amount withheld]. The company's Board of Directors made this decision on November 12, 2024, pending the anticipated approval at the forthcoming Extra General Meeting.

news.headline: JBT Corp's takeover offer for Marel hf. shares expired on Dec 20, 2024, with at least 90% shares accepted.
news.summary: Chicago-based JBT Corporation (NYSE: JBT), a prominent technology solutions provider in the food and beverage industry, revealed that its voluntary acquisition bid for all outstanding shares of Marel hf. (ICL: Marel) concluded on December 20, 2024, at 12:00 PM GMT. The offer, targeting a minimum of 90% of Marel's shares, has now fulfilled all requirements for completion.

news.headline: Developer of Tornado Cash seeks dropped charges, as sanctions found invalid. Motion states Mr. Storm not at fault.
news.summary: A court filing contends that Mr. Storm was unable to take any intentional action regarding Tornado Cash.

news.headline: Bybit offers 20,000 USDT prize pools to users in South Asia and Africa, with 10,000 USDT each.#EndOfYearBonanza
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on December 20, 2024, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, is set to wrap up the year with a special event for users on Bybit P2P. Qualified users will have the opportunity to participate in lucky spins, offering them a shot at winning from two grand bonus pools, each valued at 10,000 USDT. Certain users in specific regions will have access to this promotion.

news.headline: John Wooden emphasizes importance of strategic planning, which is not annual chore. Article by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Iconic basketball coach and educator John Wooden once stated the importance of preparation, highlighting that failure to prepare ultimately leads to failure. This underscores the significance of strategic planning in achieving success. Thus, strategic planning should not be viewed as a dreaded annual task, but rather as a necessary tool for growth and progress. This notion is emphasized in a recent piece on Investor's Business Daily, urging businesses to prioritize strategic planning to steer towards success.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk stock plunges on failed obesity drug trial, Eli Lilly and Viking Therapeutics surge.
news.summary: On Friday, Novo Nordisk experienced a significant decrease in stock value following disappointing results from its obesity drug trial CagriSegma. The Danish company's stock plummeted by X%. In contrast, Eli Lilly and Viking Therapeutics saw an increase in stock value. Eli Lilly's stock rose by Y%, while Viking Therapeutics witnessed a Z% surge. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: PLTR stock surged 343% in 2024 after Trump's win; UBS neutral on high valuation. Buy/sell query.
news.summary: The stock of PLTR has surged by 343% in the year 2024, a significant portion of which was observed subsequent to Trump's victory in the election. This increase is largely attributed to the anticipation of a rise in government AI automation. Following this, UBS has initiated coverage with a Neutral rating. With the stock maintaining a high valuation, the question arises whether Palantir stock should be considered for buying or selling.

news.headline: China's NMPA approves Innovent's DOVBLERON® (ROS1 inhibitor) - 2024, San Francisco. Innovent develops high-quality medicines for oncology, cardiovascular.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Innovent Biologics, Inc. known as Innovent, headquartered in SAN FRANCISCO and SUZHOU, China, announced significant developments. The company, listed on the Hong Kong Exchange as 01801, is renowned for its high-quality medicine production across various fields like oncology, cardiovascular, and metabolic treatment.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Motors North America celebrates 5 years in Tennessee, marking success since 1982 with milestone growth.
news.summary: In Franklin, Tennessee, on December 20, 2024, Mitsubishi Motors North America, Inc. (MMNA) is commemorating a noteworthy achievement - its five-year anniversary in the state. This denotes a major milestone in the company's development and prosperity in the United States, following the initiation of operations in 1982. Over the span of 37 years, MMNA has established itself as a key player in the automotive industry, showcasing resilience and progress.

news.headline: Monster Energy Up & Up Festival announces Sidepiece as Spring 2025 headliner for crowd-funded college tour; fans determine tour dates.
news.summary: In Corona, California on December 20, 2024, the Monster Energy Up & Up Festival, known as the biggest and most enduring college music tour, revealed Sidepiece as the headline act for Spring 2025. Renowned for its unique approach, this tour allows the fans to determine the dates and route, resulting in nearly all tickets being sold out consistently.
